transcript_preview: 6.25. Klausies. Sanumurē atbilžu secību. Ko tu šodien dari? Es pusdienoju ar draugu. Cikos tu ej gulēt? Desmitos vakarā. Kad tu iesi uz darbu? Parīt iešu uz darbu. Kad tu brauksi uz Oslo? Rīt no rīta. Vai tu rīt apmeklēsi draugu? Nē. Kur tu
translation_preview: Listen. The sequence of answers is numbered. What are you doing today? I'm having lunch with a friend. What time are you going to sleep? Ten o'clock in the evening. When are you going to work? I'm going to work tomorrow. When are you going
